w:r.w:t: Course Map · 7 Tracks · 28 Courses · NQF Levels 3 – 8

Ginashe Digital Academy (GDA) is a purpose-built learning institution under the Ginashe Group, headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa. Its mandate is to accelerate digital transformation across South Africa and the broader African continent by equipping learners — from school leavers to C-suite executives — with job-ready digital skills.

All programmes are designed for alignment with the South African Qualifications Authority (SAQA) National Qualifications Framework (NQF), SETA unit standards, and QCTO qualifications — positioning GDA for formal accreditation and government recognition. The academy is equally structured to meet the skills development requirements of continental frameworks such as those promoted under the African Union's Digital Transformation Strategy.
GDA programmes are built on three foundational principles:
Earn-while-you-learn pathways — all courses include practical, project-based assessments that map directly to workplace tasks, ensuring learners are employment-ready from day one.

Stackable qualifications — each course is a building block. Learners enter at the Foundation level and progress to Enterprise level within a track, or move laterally across tracks as their careers evolve.
African context — case studies, data sets, and capstone projects are drawn from South African and pan-African business realities, ensuring relevance for the local market.
The four progression levels map to the South African NQF as follows:
School leavers, first-time job seekers, general public
Mid-career specialists, team leads, technical practitioners
Senior managers, directors, executives, C-suite leaders
The table below maps all 28 courses across 7 tracks and 4 NQF progression levels. ★ marks Cloud Launchpad, the first course to be fully developed.
How AI works · Prompt craft · Ethics
Kali Linux · Pen testing · CompTIA S+
Brief descriptions for all 28 courses across the seven tracks are provided below. Detailed lesson plans, assessments and unit standard mappings are developed per course during subsequent phases.
AWS/Azure/GCP fundamentals, Linux CLI, IP networking, cloud security intro. SETA-aligned unit standards.
Preparation for AWS Cloud Practitioner & AZ-900. Identity management, virtual machines, blob/S3 storage.
Well-Architected Framework, multi-AZ design, disaster recovery, cloud cost governance.
Enterprise cloud strategy, landing zone deployment, multi-cloud governance, FinOps practices.
Introduction to AI concepts, generative AI, prompt engineering, AI ethics and responsible use.
Supervised/unsupervised learning, feature engineering, model selection, Python ML toolchain.
Building LLM-powered applications, retrieval-augmented generation, API integration, model deployment.
Enterprise AI adoption, risk frameworks, AI KPIs, regulatory compliance, bias mitigation.
Cyber threat landscape, safe browsing, password hygiene, phishing awareness, home/work security.
Reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, exploitation basics, CompTIA Security+ exam prep.
Security operations centre workflow, SIEM tools, log analysis, incident detection & response.
Enterprise security strategy, POPIA compliance, ISO 27001 implementation, board reporting.
Reading and interpreting data, Excel/Sheets, basic SQL queries, chart design, data storytelling.
Business Intelligence dashboards, Python pandas, descriptive statistics, data visualisation.
Building ETL/ELT pipelines, dbt transformations, Apache Spark, Snowflake/BigQuery.
Chief Data Officer capability, data mesh architecture, AI-augmented analytics, data governance strategy.
Essential workplace digital tools, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, digital communication, remote work.
Power Automate, Zapier, process mapping, low-code platforms, business process management.
Leading digital change, customer experience design, digital roadmap planning, stakeholder management.
Chief Digital Officer curriculum: digital strategy, innovation management, digital KPI frameworks.
Web fundamentals, HTML5/CSS3, intro Python, version control with Git, first web project.
Frontend React, backend Node.js/Express, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, full-stack project delivery.
Containerisation, Kubernetes orchestration, GitHub Actions CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code.
Site reliability engineering, internal developer platforms, cloud cost governance, platform strategy.
Lean startup concepts, building an online presence, SEO basics, social media strategy, digital branding.
E-commerce store setup, paid advertising, social media marketing, Google Analytics, conversion optimisation.
Product management principles, growth frameworks, monetisation models, digital venture strategy.
Venture building, investor readiness, pan-African market entry, scaling digital businesses across Africa.
